recommended_wording: This walkthrough shows that TRIM-HAA can represent field-level differences in one independent-record comparison.
The walkthrough records hashes for source packet, instructions, prompt, output, and locked author record.
The walkthrough displays a candidate certainty-alternative mismatch for subsequent independent evaluation.
The walkthrough does not adjudicate the model record.
The model record uses low uncertainty while omitting an explicit alternative; this is a candidate for later evaluation.
No reliability comparison is supported by this walkthrough.
Exposure-associated change requires human-pre and human-post data.
Causal exposure claims require an approved design beyond this walkthrough.
This walkthrough motivates a testable question for larger studies.
This walkthrough concerns audit visibility, not quality improvement.
